name: realtor-lead-capture
description: Turns the agent's offer into a lead-capture machine. It writes a lead magnet (a brand-led guide for their whole audience, or a focused buyer/seller guide built straight from their offer) and maps the opt-in funnel that gives it away — two perfectly aligned documents the agent takes to claude.ai/design to build. Text only: it writes the copy and structure, it never designs or hosts. Lead capture only — no call booking. Requires Plugin 1 (the Brain) set up first.
